title: Clarify Access Review Policy – Add Quarterly Review Requirement
description: As per recent compliance audit, the Access Review Policy (article KB-101) must be updated to include a quarterly review cycle for all user access privileges. Currently the policy only requires an annual review, which may leave gaps. Please update KB-101 with this clarification. This ticket is for tracking purposes only; do not close until the article is updated.

title: Laptop hardware replacement – docking station issues
description: User's laptop dock intermittently disconnects external monitors. Troubleshooting steps completed; replacement docking station ordered.

title: Update onboarding checklist for new hires
description: The current onboarding checklist is missing steps for equipment allocation and security badge activation. Please review and propose updates.
